race.description: Sunset Soiree Book Now Maiden Plate
race.comment: TULONG (4) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing in seven of 12 starts overall and strikes a very winnable contest here. Will be rock-hard fit for this and should be right there when the whips are cracking. RUSTY TYCOON (6) has hit the top-five in all six career outings including placing over this track and trip two back. Looms as the main danger. INSIDE PASSAGE (5) has placed over this mile journey and will strip fitter second-up from the break. In the mix. PEAK MISS (9) has been right there in recent efforts and looks a must for the multiples. PIGGIETALES (10) is stepping up in trip after finishing eighth over 1400m at Eagle Farm last time out. Finds the right race and can feature.
